# Norma Core

> Norma Core is a portable hybrid wiki contract for LLM-active memory, durable knowledge bases, and careful agent-driven mutations.

This file is an agent discovery entrypoint. It is not the write-time source of truth.

Use this order:
1. Read `WIKI_SCHEMA.md` for neutral discovery and path conventions.
2. Read `AGENTS.md` if your agent uses AGENTS instructions.
3. Read `CLAUDE.md` for canonical write-time rules, mutation rules, and verification.
4. In an initialized vault, read `wiki/hot.md` first for active memory, then `wiki/index.md`, then only the relevant canonical pages.

Keep the write path simple:
- `CLAUDE.md` is the canonical write-time contract.
- `wiki/index.md` and `wiki/log.md` remain mandatory control-plane files after mutations.
- `wiki/hot.md` is a non-canonical cache and must stay under 500 words.
- `rawinput/` is staging; `raw/` is immutable after ingest.
- Prefer updating or superseding an existing durable page over creating duplicates.

## Agent Entry Points

- [WIKI_SCHEMA.md](WIKI_SCHEMA.md): neutral vault schema, paths, and retrieval priority.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): compatibility shim for Codex and other AGENTS-aware agents.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): canonical write-time operating contract.
- [skills/ingest-wiki/SKILL.md](skills/ingest-wiki/SKILL.md): reusable ingest, direct-update, lint, and save-output workflow.
- [wiki/tech/norma-orchestrator.md](wiki/tech/norma-orchestrator.md): current trust contract for the merged Norma Core PR96 orchestrator.
- [README.md](README.md): install and smoke-test instructions.

## Commands

- Initialize a vault: `python3 scripts/init_vault.py /path/to/vault`
- Initialize with sample input: `python3 scripts/init_vault.py /tmp/norma-core-vault --with-sample`
- Validate this package: `python3 scripts/validate_hybrid.py`

## Optional

- [EXAMPLES.md](EXAMPLES.md): examples of good and bad agent behavior.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): package change history.
- [audit/hybrid-audit-report.md](audit/hybrid-audit-report.md): rationale and benchmark notes.
